items.briefing:
A recent study highlights that most organisations have already experienced AI-related security incidents, a concern relevant to Australian training providers increasingly using AI tools. Separately, research shows overall cybercrime risk is declining for Australians, but small and medium businesses (SMBs) are now bearing more pressure as cybercriminals shift their focus — a reminder that no organisation is too small to be a target.

**Practical tip:** Review what AI tools your staff are using and ensure they are approved, reputable platforms — if you're unsure, check with your IT contact before using a new AI service for work tasks.

featured.title: Most firms hit by AI security incidents, study finds
featured.quote: Most Australian organisations exposed to AI security breaches, requiring urgent defensive action.
